title: oreocharis wumengensis
intro: Oreocharis wumengensis, also known as the Wumeng Oreocharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oreocharis wumengensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
